title: Specify human tree root history buffer matching agent tree
description: IdentityRegistry maintains a 30-root history buffer for agentTree but none for humanTree. The contract comment says 'humanTree uses Semaphore's' but the deployed code uses a standalone LeanIMT with no history. Any new human enrollment immediately invalidates in-flight proofs. Add a parallel ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE buffer for humanTree roots in the registry, and update the IETF draft's Security Considerations to document the staleness window. This is a protocol-level correctness gap, not just an implementation detail.
